name: Dushman-e-Jaan
overview: In drama serial Dushman e Jaan both of the leading actors that are Ramsha and Hatim are arrogant and very concerned about themselves. However, in the office of Ramsha, both of them faced a collision, and Hatim being an arrogant person did not apologize. On the other hand, Ramsha says some inappropriate words to him, which results in a conflict.

trailers.title: New Drama Serial Dushman-E-Jaan Coming Soon Only On ARY Digital
